UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Seven of Swords card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Seven of Swords card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Seven of Swords card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Seven of Swords card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Seven of Swords card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Seven of Swords card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the cunning nature of Coyote Anansi, his stealthy approach, and the five swords he has successfully stolen.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the negative connotations of theft; instead, focus on the trickster aspect of this character.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Seven of Swords card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, oboe, ethereal, mystical, ambient, minor, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Seven of Swords card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Seven of Swords card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the themes of deception, betrayal, and guilt associated with the sneaky courtier in the Seven of Swords reversed.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the oily noble or detailed velvet ruffles imagery as they may distract from the primary focus on the character's actions.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Seven of Swords card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, harp, strings, flute, minor, contemplative, ethereal, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Seven of Swords card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Seven of Swords card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the strategic nature of Hermes, the thief guide, as he sneaks away with the swords, emphasizing the need for quiet, active, and sly actions.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the guilt or theft aspect, instead focus on the wisdom and redirect associated with Hermes.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Seven of Swords card in an between position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, reed organ, mystical, ambient, introspective, instrumental
